Man cheng jin dai huang jin jia (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,566,773Details
International Box Office $70,337,656
Worldwide Box Office $76,904,429
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $11,246,145
Total $11,246,145
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$478,771 (7.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:8.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$45,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:60 opening theaters/1,234 max. theaters, 2.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,548,648

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 21st, 2006 (Limited) by Sony Pictures Classics, released as Curse of the Golden Flower
Video Release: March 27th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment, released as Curse of the Golden Flower
MPA Rating: R for violence
Running Time: 114 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Son or Daughter, Dysfunctional Family, Political Assassination, Royalty
Social setting: Rebellion
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: Ancient China
Source:Based on Play
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production Countries: Hong Kong, China
Languages: Mandarin
